speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai
text: Subah se ajeeb si ghabrahat ho rahi hai, aankhon ke aage andhera chha gaya aur main bacchon ke samne hi rone lagi. Dimaag bilkul blank hai, samajh nahi aa raha kya ho raha hai. Is waqt mujhe kuch nahi sujh raha, bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalise mild risk softly, then mirror the quality of emotional overwhelm without asking for the stressor.
text: Achanak se is tarah aankhon ke aage andhera chha jana aur itni zor se rona aana, jab dimaag bilkul blank ho jaye, waqayi bahut darawna hota hai aur aisi ghabrahat mehsoos hona bilkul normal hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai
text: Haan, mere haath buri tarah kaanp rahe hain. Bacche bhi darr gaye mujhe aise dekh kar aur main unhe breakfast bhi nahi de paayi. Bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai, saans lena mushkil lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration and physical weight of holding this panic while worrying about the kids.
text: Itni der se is ghabrahat ko apne andar mehsus karna aur bacchon ki chinta ke beech is saans atakne jaisi takleef ko jhelna sach mein bahut lamba aur thaka dene wala waqt lag raha hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kaise na ho ghabrahat? Subah mobile pe EMI bounce ka message dekha tha. Mummy ke kidney treatment ne pichle saal meri MNC ki saari savings wipe out kar di hain. Ab mere paas kuch nahi bacha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of survival now that the financial cushion is gone due to medical bills.
text: Bina kisi aarthik sahare ke achanak us EMI bounce ka message dekhne ke baad, ab aage ghar aur mummy ka ilaaj kaise chalega, yeh darr aur lachari aur bhi badh jati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Darr lag raha hai aur bura bhi. Main ek single mother hoon, mere upar bacchon ke future ki aur mummy ki poori responsibility hai. Mujhe humesha strong rehna tha, par aaj main himmat haar gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the heavy duty frame of being the sole provider expected to hold everyone together.
text: Akele apne bacchon ka bhavishya sanwarne aur ghar ko bina kisi sahare ke chalane ki is bhari aur badi zimmedari ne tumhe andar se poori tarah thaka diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thak toh gayi hoon aur sharam bhi aa rahi hai. Agar office mein kisi ko pata chala ki mere paas hospital bills ke baad rent aur EMI ke bhi paise nahi hain, toh izzat kya reh jayegi meri?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue about workplace reputation with a soft pause, shorter length, and no question.
text: Logon ki nazron mein apni izzat banaye rakhne ke liye is majboori ko akele chupana pad raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai
text: Haan... koi nahi samajhta ki bahar se perfect dikhne wali working woman andar se kitni akeli aur khokhli ho chuki hai. Kitchen ka kaam tak nahi ho raha ab, bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the hidden exhaustion of enduring this heavy duty alone (C5 + Duty_Based).
text: Lagta hai ki akele mummy ki bimari aur bacchon ko sambhalte hue, is aarthik bojh aur perfect banne ke dabaav ke niche tum poori tarah se thak chuki ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Thakan aisi hai ki dimaag ne kaam karna band kar diya hai. Mujhe apne bacchon ke liye dukh ho raha hai, unhe aaj meri is bebus halat ko dekhna pada.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her fear and fatigue as culturally normal, separating her worth from the financial outcome.
text: Akele itni badi medical emergency aur job dono sambhalne wali maa ka is EMI wale jhatke se achanak toot jana bilkul swabhavik hai, is paise ki takleef mein tumhari mamta ya mehnat ki koi kami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mehnat ki kami toh nahi hai, lekin MNC mein toh result chahiye hota hai na. Agar meri performance is tension ki wajah se giri, toh kahin job na chali jaye. Tab kya hoga bacchon ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Brief systemic anecdote to normalize the hidden burden of debt and single motherhood.
text: Single mothers jo corporate mein kaam karti hain, unme akele ghar ki bimariyan sambhalne aur aarthik darr ka yeh bojh bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki sab workplace pe strong dikhna chahte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunkar thodi tasalli hui ki main akeli nahi hoon is dual life mein. Par haqeeqat toh wahi hai... savings khatam hain aur bills pending hain. Dimaag soch ke phir ghoomne lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the recurring nature of the financial fear over time.
text: Din bhar is sachai aur akelapan ke beech baar baar us financial ghabrahat ka laut aana, ek ajeeb si thakan ka ehsaas dilata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul waisa hi lag raha hai. Par aise darr ke baith toh nahi sakti na main. Mujhe mummy aur bacchon ko dekhna hai. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, batao kya karoon main?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer 2 simple physical grounding options executable immediately at home.
text: Abhi turant bank ya HR ke baare mein sochne ki jagah, kya tum agle panch minute bacchon ke paas jaakar unke saath ek glass paani pi sakti ho, ya kitchen mein kursi par aaram se baith sakti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main kitchen mein kursi par hi baith jati hoon ek glass paani lekar. Bacche abhi darr ke maare chupchap padhai karne baith gaye hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk the drinking water suggestion step by step.
text: Pehle aaram se us kursi par tek lagakar baith jao... phir paani ke do ghoont piyo aur ek lambi saans lo... bas itna hi aaj is pal ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai
text: Paani pee liya maine thoda. Thodi saans aayi hai abhi. Pehle jo lag raha tha ki bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai subah se, wo darr ki wave abhi zara si kam hui hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe from C5 category to normalize savings wipe-out and medical debt.
text: Private aspatalo ke mehnge bills aur lamba treatment hone par, acche khase aam parivaron ki savings wipe out ho jana humare healthcare system ki ek sachai hai, jisme tumhara koi fault ya mismanagement nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Fault nahi hai par bhugatna toh mujhe hi pad raha hai akele. Khair, mujhe bank ko ek mail karni hogi EMI restructure ki request ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her return to the duty frame as she refocuses on solving the debt.
text: Thodi saans aate hi, tum wapas ek jimmedar maa aur head of the family ki tarah bank ki aage ki prakriya aur apni duty ke baare mein sochne lagi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Karna padega. Agar main nahi karungi toh bank wale toh penalty lagate jayenge. Ek mail draft karni padegi MNC ke HR ko bhi, shayad thoda advance ya loan mil jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence motivating her proactive steps.
text: Aage aane wali penalties aur financial nuksaan ko rokne ki wajaha se, tumhara HR aur bank se options maangne ka yeh plan bilkul zaruri lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, zaroori toh hai par HR ko likhte waqt ego beech mein aayegi. Kabhi aisi naubat nahi aayi thi meri azaad zindagi mein. Kisi ke aage haath phailana bahut ajeeb lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma/ego cue with a soft pause, shorter length, and no question.
text: Tumne hamesha apne dam par ghar chalaya hai, aur doosron se madad maangne ka yeh ehsaas chubhta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan chubhta hai, par abhi ego se zyada zaroori mummy ki dawai aur bacchon ka school hai. Mujhe unhe himmat deni hogi, toh mail toh likhni hi padegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her resilience and prioritization of family over ego.
text: Ghabrahat aur apni jhijhak ko piche chhod kar, apne parivar ki ahem zarooraton aur dawaiyon ko pehli prathmikta dena ek maa ke roop mein tumhari sabse badi taqat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Taqat ka toh pata nahi, bas apna farz nibha rahi hoon. Pehle se dimaag kafi shant hai abhi, wo dhundh thodi hati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her shift from emotional overwhelm to functional calm (Lens F applied to calm state).
text: Jahan subah aankhon ke aage andhera chhaya tha, wahan ab tumhara dimaag shanti aur thehrav mehsus kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai
text: Sahi kaha. Wo jo subah lag raha tha ki bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai, wo ab control mein aa gaya hai. Main mail ka format soch rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Another normalising systemic frame about financial recovery taking time.
text: Jab koi achanak is tarah financial dhakka lagta hai, toh use poori tarah handle karne aur naye raste nikalne ki prakriya dheere dheere aage badhti hai aur isme waqt lagna tay hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Waqt toh lagega hi. Ek sath sab magically manage nahi hoga. Aaj bas HR ko mail karungi aur bacchon ko jaakar dilaasa dungi ki sab theek hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her clear plan and limited scope for today.
text: Sirf aaj ke din ke liye in do chhote aur sabse zaroori kaamon par dhyan lagane ka yeh faisla bahut hi samjhdari wala kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya meri baatein sunne ke liye. Aapse baat karke halaat ka samna karne ki thodi himmat aayi hai. Main abhi kitchen ka bacha hua kaam pura kar leti hoon pehle.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her responsible choice to conclude the session and leave an open door.
text: Apne rozmara ke kaamon mein wapas lautne ki aur bacchon ko sambhalne ki tumhari yeh majboot shuruaat dekh kar acha lag raha hai, aur main yahan hamesha hoon jab bhi tumhe dobara baat karni ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai
text: Mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai is waqt... bas ek emotional flooding hai aur kuch samajh nahi aa raha. Ek ajeeb sa darr andar hi andar kha raha hai mujhe, jaise sab kuch haath se nikal raha ho aur main phans gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the raw emotional overwhelm without rushing to uncover the specific stressor.
text: Jab achanak se itni ghabrahat ek sath haavi ho jati hai, toh sach mein dimaag aur sochne ki taqat bilkul jawab de dete hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki akele larte larte main poori tarah thak gayi hoon. Mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai roz ki fikar mein... bas andhera dikh raha hai aage bacchon ke future ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the exhaustion of managing everything alone over a long period.
text: Itne lambe waqt se sab kuch akele sambhalte hue, ab achanak is andhere mein gehari thakan ka mehsoos hona lazmi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaj bank ka EMI bounce hone ka message aaya. Maine bacchon ki FD aur apni shaadi ka bacha-kucha sona tak bech diya tha hospital ka karz chukane ke liye, phir bhi aaj yeh din dekhna pad raha hai mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the sacrifice of family assets for medical needs that led to this moment.
text: Bacchon aur parivar ke ilaj ke liye apni aakhiri jama-punji tak laga dene ke baad, achanak yeh EMI ka message aana dil ko buri tarah tod deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai
text: Main ek divorced aurat hoon. Neighborhood shame pehle hi bohot thi mere akelepan ko lekar, ab is paise ki zillat mein main bilkul toot gayi hoon. Mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai log kya kahenge soch kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using stigma protocol to softly mirror the fear of societal judgment without pushing with a question.
text: Akele bacche paalne ke baad, padosiyon ki baaton aur us daag ka darr ab is mushkil mein aur zyada dara raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, lagta tha ki akeli maa ban kar main apne bacchon ko sab de paungi. Par ab lagta hai main ek failure hoon. Hospital ke bil ne sab tabah kar diya, main dhal nahi ban payi unke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the deep unacknowledged exhaustion and self-blame that comes with trying to be a perfect provider alone.
text: Lagta hai ki bacchon ka akele pet paalne ki is lambi jaddojahad mein, aur phir achanak is karz ke bojh tale, ek gehra exhaustion aur khud par gussa baith gaya hai tumhare andar.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai
text: Sach mein, thakan itni hai ki ab rone ki bhi himmat nahi bachi. Bachon ki choti choti khwahishein bhi poori nahi kar pa rahi aaj kal. Mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai yeh soch kar ki ab unka future kya hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the extreme fatigue and separating her worth as a mother from the systemic issue of expensive healthcare.
text: Ek single mother ke roop mein akele aspatal ke itne bade kharche uthana kisi ki bhi himmat tod sakta hai. Tumhari thakan bilkul jayaz hai, aur yeh aafat system ke mehenge ilaj ki wajah se aayi hai, isme tumhari mamta ya mehnat ki bilkul koi kami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lekin baaki duniya toh yahi sochegi na ki aurat akele ghar nahi chala payi. Divorced hone ka taana hamesha milta hai, aur ab yeh EMI bounce ki zillat meri bachi-kuchi izzat bhi cheen legi society mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a systemic anecdote to reduce isolation and frame her financial struggle as common among single mothers.
text: Hamare samaj mein akele ghar chala rahi mahilaon ke liye medical emergency ke baad karz mein dubna bahut common hai — sirf tumhare saath nahi ho raha, lekin koi openly bolega nahi kyunki divorce aur akelepan par log jaldi judge karte hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai
text: Wahi judgement toh maar rahi hai mujhe andar se. Duniya ke saamne acting karni padti hai ki sab theek hai, bas school fees time pe chali jaye. Par ab acting karte karte mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai puri tarah.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the emotional toll of maintaining a strong facade for the world and the children.
text: Duniya aur bacchon ke saamne ek majboot maa ki acting karte rehna, aur andar hi andar akele darkar jeena, bohot thaka deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Main aur aise ghut kar nahi jee sakti. Bacchon ke liye mujhe kisi tarah is dal-dal se nikalna hi hoga. Ab kya karoon samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, is ghabrahat se bahar aane ke liye kya rasta hai?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, manageable choices to regain control and alleviate immediate anxiety.
text: Is dark aur ghabrahat se thoda bahar aane ke liye hum do chote kadam soch sakte hain: ya toh bank manager ko apni medical crisis samjhane ke liye ek rough letter draft kar lo, ya fir abhi sirf aane wale ek hafte ke zaroori kharcho ki choti si list bana lo takki dimaag thoda halka mehsoos kare.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kharcho ki list toh bacchon ka ration aur fees hi hai. Bank manager wala draft likhna sahi rahega shayad. Par abhi bhi ghabrahat mein hath kaanp rahe hain, samajh nahi aa raha ki shuruwat mein kya likhu.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guiding her through drafting the application step-by-step to bypass the paralysis.
text: Pehle apni ek saans par dhyan do, phir ek sadha paper nikal lo... usme bas apna loan account number likho aur Hindi-English mila kar medical emergency ki wajah se EMI na de pane ki line likh do... bas itna hi draft karke rakhna hai aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Paper nikal liya maine. Likh bhi diya ki hospital ke bhari bills ki wajah se iss baar ki kist nahi gayi. Par sach batao, kya bank wale single mother ki baat thande dimag se sunenge?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing reassuring systemic information about how banks handle documented medical crises.
text: Bank guidelines mein aksar badi medical crisis ek valid kaaran mana jata hai, aur jab customer khud aage se inform karta hai, toh woh penalty rokar EMI restructure karne ya thoda extra samay dene mein cooperate karte hain, bina kisi bhed-bhav ke.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sun kar sach mein thodi si tasalli mili hai mujhe. Darr toh andar isi baat ka thaa ki recovery wale ghar na aa jayein, phir toh neighborhood wale jeena haram kar dete bacchon ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting that her core panic was driven by the fear of public shaming affecting her children.
text: Padosiyon ke samne tamasha banne ka aur bacchon ke aage izzat girne ka darr hi tha jo tumhe pichle kuch ghanto se andar se sabse zyada dara raha tha...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai
text: Bilkul, kyunki izzat ke siwa ab mere paas bacha hi kya hai. Par yeh letter draft karke thodi jaan mein jaan aayi hai. Subah se lag raha tha mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai par ab theek lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the transition from paralysis to active protection of her dignity.
text: Bacchon ki maa hone ke naate khud ki izzat bachane ke liye jo kadam tumne abhi uthaya hai, usse woh pehle wali bebasi ab dheere dheere himmat mein badal rahi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bebasi toh kafi kam hui hai abhi. Ek baat aur hai jo dimaag mein chal rahi hai, mujhe apne maike walon se madat maangni chahiye kya? Divorce ke baad se unhone bhi ek doori bana li thi mujhse.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Exploring the conflict between her need for support and the pain of past rejection.
text: Jin apno ne pehle doori bana li thi, unse ab is aarthik sankat mein wapas madat maangne ka khayal aate hi tumhe andar kaisa mehsoos hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sharam si aati hai kahu toh. Unhone toh pehle hi taana maara tha ki 'divorce legi toh khud jhelna'. Par bacchon ke chehre dekh kar lagta hai ki apna ego side rakh dena chahiye abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her willingness to sacrifice her pride for the sake of her children.
text: Apne purane ghav aur self-respect ko chot pahunchne ke bavajood, bacchon ke future aur unki zarooraton ke samne tum apna sab kuch bhulane ko taiyar ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Maa hoon na, aur bacchon ki takleef dekhi nahi jaati. Kal shayad bank letter dene ke baad main apne bhai ko ek baar call karke sachai bataungi. Daantega woh, par shayad thodi support kar de.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the act of reaching out to family during extreme financial stress.
text: Aise kathin waqt mein, chahe purani batein kuch bhi rahi hon, parivar ko thoda confidence mein lene se kai baar aarthik madat ke alawa ek aisa emotional sahara bhi mil jata hai jo akelepan ko kaafi hadd tak tod deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Umeed toh yahi hai sach kahu toh. Agar usne nahi bhi kiya toh kam se kam maine ek try toh kiya bacchon ke liye. Ab bank jane ka plan clear hai, pehle bacchon ko khana khilana hai. Ghabrahat kafi kam ho gayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the shift from the morning's paralysis to having a clear actionable timeline.
text: Jo subah se bilkul ruka hua aur thehra hua lag raha tha, ab us waqt ki jagah ek clear soch ne aur aage ke steps ne le li hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai
text: Haan, ek clear plan ne woh darr bhaga diya hai kafi hadd tak. Main itni asani se haar nahi man sakti bacchon ke liye. Pata nahi kal kya hoga par subah mera dimaag sunn ho gaya tha, ab thoda saaf dikh raha hai sab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting how her bond with her children serves as her main source of resilience.
text: Un bacchon ki muskaan aur unka tumpar bharosa hi tumhe baar baar girne ke baad wapas is darr se larrne ki taqat de raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Unke liye hi toh FD banayi thi aur unke liye hi woh sab bech diya. Par maa toh hoon main unki. Yeh bura waqt bhi guzar hi jayega jab bank settle hoga thoda.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirming her identity and duty as a mother as the anchor for her renewed confidence.
text: Maa hone ke farz ko poori shiddat se nibhane ki wajah se hi tumhe is bure waqt ke guzar jane par itna bharosa wapas aa paya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you aaj aise meri baat sunne ke liye. Yeh akelapan aur darr kha raha tha mujhe subah se. Ab main bacchon ko khana khila kar unke paas sone ja rahi hoon, kal naye sire se bank ko face karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her successful shift from paralyzing anxiety to a grounded, proactive state.
text: Is akelepan aur khud ko blame karne ke bojh ko peechhe chhod kar, kal nayi himmat ke sath aage badhne ki tumhari taiyari sach mein dilasa dene wali hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rone ka control nahi ho raha
text: Bas ek gehra despair hai jo mujhe saans nahi lene de raha... main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takti rahi. Andar kuch samajh nahi aa raha, aur rone ka control nahi ho raha mere se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the raw feeling of suffocation and numbness (Lens F) while applying the high-risk protocol for severe distress and breathlessness.
text: Achanak se aisi ghutan mehsoos hona aur sab sunn pad jana bahut bhaari lagta hai. Main yahan sirf tumhe sunne ke liye hoon, par agar ghabrahat itni badh rahi hai ki saans mein dikkat ho, toh tum iCall 9152987821 par kisi se fauran baat kar sakti ho. Kya abhi tum kisi aisi jagah par ho jahan tum safe ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rone ka control nahi ho raha
text: Akele hi hoon ghar pe, bache so rahe hain andar. Safe hoon par andar se bilkul toot chuki hoon main. Andhera chha raha hai aur rone ka control nahi ho raha mujhse.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the painful duration of enduring this darkness alone (Lens D) and holding space per the moderate-risk protocol.
text: Itne akele is andhere aur rone ko itni der se chupchap bardasht karna wakai bohut taqleef deh hai. Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kaise theek rahun? Medical expense spiral ne humein poora road par la diya hai pichle mahino se. Aaj kist bounce hone ka message aaya toh laga jaise aage badhne ka raasta hi band ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the mild risk by validating the sudden financial shock, then mirroring the feared consequence of the blocked future (Lens E).
text: Aise achanak sab taraf se kharche aana kisi ko bhi tod sakta hai. Yeh kist bounce hone ka message dekh kar aage kya hoga, us badhti hui mushkil ka darr ekdum se haawi ho gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rone ka control nahi ho raha
text: Sabse zyada darr bacchon ka future dekh kar lagta hai. Gaon mein kisan bhai ki chit fund wali savings thi, wo bhi Mummy ke operation mein lag gayi. Ye soch kar rone ka control nahi ho raha ki us bechare ne apni kheti daaw pe laga di.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the relational pain, specifically the guilt tied to the brother's sacrifice and children's future (Lens C).
text: Apne bacchon ke future ki fikar aur saath hi kisan bhai ki jama poonji kharch ho jane ka guilt, in dono rishton ki fikar ne tumhe is waqt andar se aur zyada bebas kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bebasi isliye bhi hai kyunki main biradari mein kisi ko bol nahi sakti. Single mother hoke akele ghar chala rahi hoon, sab taana marenge ki shehar mein rehne ki kya aukaat thi meri.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Addressing the stigma cue by restating the role/duty burden combined with societal fear (Lens B), keeping it short with a soft pause.
text: Akele sab sambhalne ki zimmedari aur biradari ke taano ka yeh darr tumhe is poore dard ko akele sehne par majboor kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main akele is sabse larte larte itni thak gayi hoon ki bayaan nahi kar sakti. Ek maa aur beti hone ke chakkar mein main apna dimaag kho rahi hoon, kuch rasta nai dikhta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the unexpressed deep exhaustion that comes from bearing the financial and relational duty alone (C5 + Duty_Based -> EXHAUSTION).
text: Lagta hai ki har taraf se paise ki maang aur akele bachon aur bhai ka poora bojh uthate uthate tum andar se poori tarah thak chuki ho, jahan aage badhne ki himmat nahi bach rahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat waise bhi kaise bachegi? Bacchon ko jab sote dekhti hoon to lagta hai jese maine unko dhokha diya. Karza itna ho gaya hai ki kal ko ghar se nikal denge toh unka kya hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her feelings as culturally normal for a single mother in the Hindi Belt, and separating her worth from the financial debt.
text: Akele shehar mein ghar aur bachon ki parwarish dekhna aur aisi achanak udhaari badhna kisi ko bhi aise darr mein daal sakta hai. Ek single mother hone ke naate bacchon ke baare mein itna sochna tumhari mamta aur ladaai ko dikhata hai, aur yeh EMI bounce hona tumhari as a mother mehnat mein koi kami nahi batata.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mehnat to ki maine, din raat ek kar diya tha. Par jab Mummy ka operation aaya, sab udhar flow ho gaya. Aam parivaar mein beemari toh sidha zameen par gira deti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a systemic anecdote to normalize medical debt among middle-class/working families and reduce personal guilt.
text: Humari families mein aisi achanak medical emergencies aane par saari savings ka daaw par lag jana bahut common hai — sirf tumhara parivaar is situation mein nahi fasa hai, lekin koi is badhti udhaari ke baare mein bahar bolega nahi kyunki sab izzat ka parda rakhna chahte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Parda rakhne ke is bojh se hi sabse zyada mera dimaag kharab ho raha tha. Thoda dil halka hua aapko bata kar. Ab samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, ab kya karoon main?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, immediate grounding options suitable for an exhausted single mother, fitting within 10 minutes and her duties.
text: Tumne akele itna bada pahaad jhela hai, yeh bohut himmat ki baat hai. Abhi dimaag thoda shant karne ke liye do chhote options hain: ya toh ek glass thanda paani peekar bachon ke paas thodi der baith jao bina kisi soch ke, ya phir ek paper par sirf bank ka naam likh kar rakh do taaki kal uspar baat ho sake. Tumhe inme se abhi kya theek lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bachon ke paas baithna hi theek rahega is waqt. Paper vagera dekhne ki himmat nahi hai abhi. Unko sote hue dekh kar shayad thodi taqat aayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guiding the Seeker step-by-step through the chosen suggestion to ground her in the present.
text: Pehle uth kar halke se apna chehra dho lo… phir thanda paani peeyo… aur aaram se jaa kar bachon ke paas baith jao, bas itna hi aaj raat ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Paani pee liya maine. Bacchon ke masoom chehre dekh rahi hoon, kuch waqt ke liye wo panicky feeling kam ho rahi hai, par kharche wala guilt dimaag mein chal hi raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a systemic reframe to shift the blame for the debt away from her personal ability and onto the structural reality of medical costs.
text: Bharat mein achanak se hospital ke massive bills aane par aache aache parivaaron ka financial balance hil jata hai. Yeh medical system ki kami hai jo aam logon ko aisi mushkil mein daal deti hai, isme tumhara as a provider koi personal failure nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap baat toh sach keh rahe ho. Beemari hone se pehle EMI bhi time pe ja rahi thi aur bhai ka chit fund se kheti aaram se chal raha tha. System itna cruel hai hum chhote logo ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting on the painful contrast between the past stability and the sudden collapse (Lens D).
text: Pichle kuch arse se jo cheezein bilkul theek chal rahi thi, unka achanak se is beemari ke chalte aise bhikhar jana wakai dimaag ko aur pareshaan kar deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, lekin ab in bacchon ki wajah se hi mujhe tutne se bachna hoga. Ek single maa hone ke naate kal main sidha bank branch jaungi baat karne.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the resilience and protective determination emerging from her despair.
text: Lagta hai is mushkil halat mein bhi tumhare andar wo maa ki himmat wapas aage aa rahi hai jo apne parivaar ke liye haar maanne ko taiyar nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat to dikhani padegi mere bhai ke liye bhi. Usne bina soche apna sab dediya. Maine vaada kiya tha usko, mujhe dreere dreere hi sahi uska paisa lautana hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her strong sense of duty and commitment to her brother despite her own struggles (Lens B).
text: Apne kisan bhai ko kiya hua wada nibhane ki lagan, ek behan hone ka tumhara atoot farz dikhati hai is mushkil samay mein bhi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rone ka control nahi ho raha
text: Kuch der pehle main soch rahi thi bhai ka kya hoga, toh mujhse rone ka control nahi ho raha tha us bebasi mein. Par ab lag raha hai ki waqt maang lungi bank se toh manage ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a second systemic reframe to demystify bank procedures and lower the perceived threat of approaching them.
text: Bank mein jakar halat batana aur EMI thodi aage badhane ki request dena ek bahut hi practical aur aam aarthik kadam hai, jo kai parivaar aisi emergencies mein uthate hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap sahi keh rahe ho. Mujhe laga tha ki woh izzat udhed denge, isliye jaane se darr rahi thi main. Par chup rahugi toh aur masla badhega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the shift away from the feared consequence of shame towards a more empowered stance (Lens E).
text: Sharm aur darr jo pehle tumhe roke hue the, wo ab is samajhdari se badal rahe hain ki chup baithne se aage ka nuksaan zyada ho sakta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul aise hi. In bacchon ke future ke liye toh main koi bhi sharm side rakh sakti hoon. Main kal pehli fursat mein baat khatam karungi branch mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her maternal strength and capability to handle the financial crisis.
text: Tumhara apne bacchon ko dekh kar is sankat se nikalne ka rasta nikalna sach mein bahut prerak hai, aur dikhata hai ki ek maa ka iraada sabse mazboot hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohat shukriya aapka sunne ke liye. Jab main aapse connect hui thi tab laga jaise meri saans rukk rahi hai darr se. Par aapse baat karke clarity aayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relief from the overwhelming feeling of suffocation that opened the conversation (Lens F).
text: Mujhe bohut khushi mehsoos ho rahi hai ki woh saans rukne wali ghutan aur akelapan ab itna kam ho gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha, dimaag thanda hua hai. Ab main chain ki neend lene ki koshish karungi, taaki subah fresh hokar apna ladaai lad sakun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her transition from despair to a hopeful and grounded calm.
text: Lagta hai ab tumhare mann mein beete hue darr ki jagah, kal subah apni zimmadari khud sambhalne ke liye ek therao aur umeed ne le li hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek samjhe aap. Kharche ka hisab baad mein bhi nikalta rahega, filhal main bacchon ke paas jaa kar sotii hoon. Aage jo hoga face kar lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a supportive close validating her ongoing journey and strength.
text: Aane wale samay mein bhi khud par yeh vishwas banaye rakhna, apni is poori ladaai mein tum bahot himmat ke sath aage badh rahi ho aur tum is safar mein akeli nahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai andar dimaag mein, jaise sab sunn pad gaya ho. Wahi darwaze pe aake zameen par baith gayi hoon, mujhse bacchon se nazrein milayi bhi nahi ja rahi aaj. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha kya ho raha hai mere sath.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feeling of overwhelm and paralysis without pushing for the stressor yet, as per Sequential Coping rules.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki yeh achanak chhayi hui ghutan aur helplessness aapko poori tarah paralyze kar chuki hai, jisme sochne samajhne ki shakti jawab de rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Haan, bilkul waisa hi. Main un masoom chehron ko kya bolungi jo ander baith kar mera intezaar kar rahe hain? Phir se ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai dimaag mein, jaise mere aur unke liye raste band ho gaye hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence regarding the children without probing the exact cause yet.
text: Apne bacchon ke aage is haalat mein aane ka darr aur unke bhavishya ko toot-te dekhne ki ghabrahat is waqt dimaag par bohot bhari pad rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bhari padna hi hai na, akele paal rahi hoon unhe. Aaj bank se call aaya ki loan default ho gaya hai. Pichle saal jo ICU ke kharche the unke pita ke time pe, wo bills ab mujhse nahi bhare ja rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the duration of her suffering since the medical emergency and how this new stressor impacts her.
text: Itne lambe samay se akele is saari medical aur financial pareshani ko poori takat se sehte hue, aaj ka yeh default wala call tumhari bachi-kuchi himmat bhi tod raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat toh tabhi toot gayi thi jab main single mother bani aur logon ne ahista ahista community exclusion shuru kar diya. Apno ne aur samaj ne kinara kar liya, kisi ne madad nahi ki meri tab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the deep relational betrayal and isolation she faced from her community.
text: Aas-pados aur apnon ke muh mod lene ke baad, akele apne bacchon ke liye is duniya se ladte hue tum khud ko hamesha poori tarah akela pa rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot akela lagta hai. Society wale toh bas tamasha dekhte hain ek akeli aurat ka. Agar bank wale ghar aaye toh zillat hogi, meri izzat mitti mein mil jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to the stigma cue with a short restatement ending in a soft pause, focusing on the feared consequence.
text: Samaj ke taanon aur bacchon ke aage us zillat ka darr bohot chubhne wala hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Chubhta hai, par usse zyada main poori tarah thak chuki hoon. Main koi aur financial help ya ek aur gold loan restructure ke baare mein sochne ki himmat nahi juta pa rahi ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying exhaustion of carrying financial and duty-based burdens alone as a single mother.
text: Lagta hai ki bacchon ke bhavishya aur akele ghar ki saari pareshaniyan chalane ki is constant chinta mein tum andar tak exhaust ho chuki ho, jahan ek naya rasta nikalne ki energy hi nahi bachi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Bilkul energy nahi hai ab. Sab akele sambhalte sambhalte fir se wahi ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai lagta hai chhod dun sab kuch, mujhse nahi hoga ab aage kuch bhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the mild risk thought gently, then validate her immense resilience as a single mother facing debt.
text: Jab akele dono maa-baap ka farz nibhana pade aur upar se medical debt ka pressure aaye, toh sab chhod dene ka khayal aana bohot swabhavik hai aur theek hai. Par itne bhari ICU bills ke bawajood, as a single mother yahan tak tikna aur abhi bhi bacchon ka sochna tumhari mamta aur mehnat ko dikhata hai, yeh default tumhari kshamta ki kami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad meri kshamta ki kami na ho, par samaj toh yahi bolega na ki is aurat se ghar aur paise nahi sambhle. Main apna 100 percent deti hoon bacchon ki school fees aur baaki cheezon ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote to break her isolation regarding single mothers and debt traps.
text: Maa hone ke naate bacchon ke liye apna sab laga dena aur fir emergency ke ilaj ke baad gold loan ya aise debt trap mein phans jana humare yahan bohot common hai—yeh sirf tumhara akele ka struggle nahi hai, par samaj ke taanon aur izzat ke darr se koi aurat khul kar yeh bolti nahi kyunki unhe weak samjha jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho aap. Par main bacchon ke saamne weak nahi padna chahti. Main unhe society ke taane nahi sunne de sakti. Par batao main karun kya ab, mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small, actionable steps that respect her lack of energy but regain some control.
text: Tumhara bacchon ko protect karne ka yeh faisla aur jazba bohot majboot hai. Abhi ghabrahat kam karne ke liye hum do choti cheezein kar sakte hain: Pehla, ek glass paani peekar agle aadhe ghante ke liye apna phone silent kar do. Doosra, apni ek notebook mein kal baat karne ke liye bank manager ka naam likh lo. Kya inme se kuch ek abhi kar sakti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Phone toh main turant silent kar dungi, uski har ring pe dil zoro se dhadakta hai. Par bank manager ka naam kyun likhun? Wo log toh bas dhamki dekar paise mangenge aur colony mein tamasha karenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide systemic info to reduce the fear of immediate public humiliation and explain standard bank processes.
text: Banking system mein single parents ya medical emergencies ke time aayi dikkaton ke liye 'hardship programs' ya loan restructuring ka ek legal form hota hai. Yeh ek normal desk procedure hai, colony mein tamasha nahi hota; iske zariye tum EMI ka amount kam ya time extend karne ki request seedhe manager se kar sakti ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sachi? Mujhe kisi ne bataya hi nahi aisi kisi cheez ke baare mein. Sab yahi kehte the ki default hote hi recovery agents seedha ghar aa kar saaman le jayenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence that was blocking her ability to act.
text: Ghar ka saaman chhin jaane aur bacchon ke saamne beizzati hone ke us darawne khayal ne hi shayad aage ke in kanooni raston ko dekhna bilkul namumkin kar diya tha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Haan bohot darr gayi thi main, meri beti choti hai aur wo dar jaati hai unchi aawaz se. Us ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai wala feeling thoda kam hua hai ab aapse sunkar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her duty-based motivation to protect her daughter.
text: Apni beti ko us darawne mahol se bachane ki ek maa ki wahi pehli koshish hi tumhe is mushkil pareshani ka shanti se hal nikalne ki nayi wajah de rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Usi beti ke liye toh main yahan tak ladti aayi hoon. Chalo maine phone toh silent kar diya. Ab main ek notebook aur pen utha ke laati hoon bagal wale kamre se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guide her step-by-step through the single chosen suggestion.
text: Bas ek lambi saans lo… ab us notebook mein apne bank ki branch aur 'Hardship Form' likh lo… aur uske baad ek minute ruko, bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Likh liya maine yeh dono shabd. Inhe dekh kar thodi himmat aayi ki in recovery walon ke aage rone ki jagah, kuch bank ka system bhi toh hota hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational shift from feeling like a helpless victim to a proactive protector of her family.
text: In do shabdon ko likhne ke baad, aisa lag raha hai jaise darr aur lachaari ki jagah ab tum apne bacchon ki shanti ke liye bank ke system se professionally baat karne ko taiyar ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main kal hi branch jaungi. Bacchon ko subah theek se school bhej kar, chup chap ja ke wahan approach karungi. Par main unhe apni medical files kaise dikhaungi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the time elapsed managing this crisis to affirm her capability to handle this next step.
text: Jab itne mahinon tak akele aspatal ke chakkar lagakar un saari medical files aur dawaiyon ko sambhal kar tum yahan tak aa gayi ho, toh kal branch mein apni haqeeqat rakhne ka yeh waqt bhi nikal jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap theek keh rahe ho. Un saare ICU ke bills ki mere paas puri file hai. Main unko prove kar sakti hoon ki paisa faaltu kharch nahi hua, bimari ne sach mein sab chheen liya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her duty-based motivation to clear her name and advocate for her family's truth.
text: Apne pariwar ki sachai aur un aspatal ke billon ko poori himmat aur samman se manager ke samne rakhne ka yeh irada, tumhari ek imaandar maa wali zimmedari ko hi aage badha raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Imaandari toh bahut rakhi maine. Ghar ki chhat bachani hai ab bas. Soch rahi hoon wo file kal ek bag mein acche se rakh lun aur manager se settle karne ki koshish karun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational care in protecting the home and finding a solution.
text: Apne ghar ki chhat aur un do nanhi jaanon ki khushi ko mehfooz rakhne ke liye apni poori tyari ke saath manager se directly baat karna sach mein kafi samajhdari wala kadam hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main ab farsh se uth rahi hoon. Kab se wahi zameen pe baithi thi ghabrayi hui. Ab kitchen mein ja ke bacchon ke liye kuch achha sa banati hoon, warna unhe lahega pata nahi kya ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her return to her primary role and daily duties for her children.
text: Apne is darawne darr ko side mein rakh kar, phirse uthna aur kitchen mein ja kar unke liye khana banane ka yeh chota sa effort ghar mein wo purani normal zindagi wapas la raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne bilkul sahi baat boli. Main in mushkilon ko apne bacchon ke bachpan ka hissa nahi banne dungi. Kal ka kaam kal hoga, aaj unke saath time bitaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the shift over time from feeling completely helpless to actively living in the present with her kids.
text: In pichle kuch waqt mein akele darwaze par rone aur mayus hone se nikal kar, seedha aaj sham apne bacchon ke sath khushi ka mahol banane tak aana sach mein ek bada aur positive badlaav hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapka bahut bahut dhanyawad. Aapne meri saari pareshani bina judge kiye suni, usse dimaag ki dhund kafi hatt gayi hai. Main ab ja rahi hoon apne bacchon ke paas.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge her deep relational connection to her children as her ultimate source of strength.
text: Apne bacchon se wahi atoot pyaar aur unki muskaan hi tumhe is akelepan wali aage ki ladaai mein sahi rasta dhoondhne aur aage badhne ki poori taqat degi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag poori tarah blast ho gaya hai
text: Main bilkul breakdown kar gayi hoon... mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha hai. Bas achanak se lag raha hai jaise dimaag poori tarah blast ho gaya hai. Is emotional flooding mein kuch bhi nahi sujh raha, bas rona aa raha hai aur andar se bahut darr lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the deep emotional overwhelm and feeling quality (Lens F) typical of sequential coping without pushing for the stressor.
text: Ekdam se itni sari ghabrahat aur rone ka man karna, sach mein bahut bhari lagta hoga jab achanak sab kuch ruk sa jaye aur kuch sujhna band ho jaye...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag poori tarah blast ho gaya hai
text: Haan, bilkul aise hi lag raha hai ki dimaag poori tarah blast ho gaya hai. Mujhe darr lag raha hai ki ab sab kuch hath se nikal jayega aur main akele apni bacchi ko aage kaise bachaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the relational frame (Lens C) acknowledging her protective role towards her daughter as the panic persists.
text: Akele sab kuch sambhalne ke is bojh mein apni beti ki suraksha ki chinta is darr ko aur bada bana deti hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Pichle mahine beti ke accident mein meri saari jama-poonji chali gayi. Ek maa hone ke nate hospital mein maine apna sab laga diya, socha aage jaise taise dekh lungi, par meri bacchi theek honi chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the feared consequences (Lens E) surrounding the loss of her savings after her daughter's emergency.
text: Beti ki is takleef ke baad apni poori jama-poonji khatam ho jane ka ehsaas aage ke halaat ko aur mushkil dikha raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag poori tarah blast ho gaya hai
text: Aur abhi aaj bank ka EMI bounce alert aa gaya mobile pe! Sahukaar ka karz pehle se tha mere sir pe. Ye notification dekh kar mera dimaag poori tarah blast ho gaya hai aur bas darr lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the heavy dual burden and duty (Lens B) of managing multiple debts alone.
text: Maa hone ke naate ek taraf hospital ka kharcha aur doosri taraf bank aur sahukaar ka ye bhari dabaw, yeh sab akele jhelna andar tak hila deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Kisi ko bata bhi nahi sakti. Biradari mein log yahi bolenge ki ek akeli aurat apna ghar bhi nahi sambhal paayi. Ye taane aur izzat jaane ka darr mujhe aur tod raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Addressed stigma cue with a shorter restatement focusing on relational isolation (Lens C) and ending with a soft pause.
text: Samaj ke in taano ka dar is akelepan aur dard ko aur badha deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Kabhi kabhi lagta hai sab kuch khatam karke bas kahin hamesha ke liye gayab ho jaun. Na ye EMI ka dar rahega na ye roz ki tension, main is sab se poori tarah se thak chuki hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Followed moderate risk flag protocol: restatement only (Lens F for feeling overwhelmed) closing with a mandatory safety check.
text: Is roz ki jaddojahad se hamesha ke liye door chale jane ka khayal, tumhari gehri thakan aur bebasi ko dikhata hai. Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag poori tarah blast ho gaya hai
text: Haan main theek hoon, aisi koi bewakoofi nahi karungi, aakhir meri beti ka mere siva is duniya mein hai hi kaun? Bas ye notices dekh kar dimaag poori tarah blast ho gaya hai aur thakan haavi ho rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Transitioning with a question after safety is confirmed to probe the core conflict beneath the debt and her maternal duty.
text: Apni beti ki khatir mazboot bane rehne ki ye koshish aapka pyar dikhati hai... par is waqt is thakan aur bank notice ke beech, sabse badi fikar kya satati hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sabse badi fikar ye hai ki humein is ghar se bhi nikal diya jayega! Agar main paise nahi chuka payi, toh meri bacchi ka future sab barbaad ho jayega. Main ek achi maa nahi ban paayi, maine sab kharab kar diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the unexpressed EXHAUSTION and guilt correctly derived from C5 + Duty_Based mechanics with the P12 persona.
text: Lagta hai ki is akeli ladaai aur jama-poonji khatam hone ke baad, aap andar se poori tarah thak chuki hain aur is maali halaat ke liye khud ko dosh de rahi hain jaise ki beti ka bhavishya aapke hath se phisal raha ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Din raat duty karti hoon, extra shifts bhi kiye the pichle saal. Par akele bacchi ko padhana aur ab accident ka itna bada kharcha... ab aur himmat hi nahi bachi hai mujhme ladaai ladne ki.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her exhaustion as culturally normal for a single mother and separating her inherent worth from the EMI bounce outcome.
text: Akele ek maa ka dono farz nibhana aur hospital ke itne kharche bina kisi madad ke jhelna kisi ko bhi poori tarah thaka sakta hai, is EMI bounce ka matlab ye nahi ki aapne apni bacchi ki parvarish mein koi kami chhod di hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par biradari walon ko kaun samjhaye? Wo toh yahi judge karenge ki ek aurat se kuch nahi ho saka. Main kisi ko apna ye darr dikha bhi toh nahi sakti, sabke aage jhuta hasna padta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a brief systemic anecdote to normalize how single mothers in her environment hide distress due to societal judgment.
text: Ek single mother ke role mein apna dard chupakar samaj ke saamne hamesha mazboot dikhna bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki humari society mein aurat ki thodi si bhi kamzori par log jaldi taane marne lagte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul yahi ghutan hoti hai andar. Lekin main apni bacchi ke aage aise hi haar maan kar toh nahi baith sakti na... batao kya karoon main abhi? Ye bank wale toh roz naya tension de denge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided two quick, achievable options taking <10 mins to manage the immediate threat of the debt, matched to her duties.
text: Aapki is aage badhne ki soch ki main sach mein daad deta hoon. Abhi ke liye do raaste hain: ya toh hum kal subah bank manager ko beti ki medical report de kar mohlat maang lein, ya aaj raat sahukaar ko phone karke byaaj ke liye thoda waqt tay kar lein. Kya theek lagta hai aapko?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahukaar ko toh phone nahi karungi, wo aadmi theek nahi hai aur raat mein toh bilkul nahi. Main kal branch wali baat pe dhyaan deti hoon. Medical report toh ghar pe hi rakhi hai mere paas.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walked through one concrete suggestion step-by-step for the bank branch visit without adding new pressure.
text: Yeh bahut hi samajhdari ka faisla hai. Pehle ek paper par loan account number likh kar rakh lijiye... phir kal subah medical report ke sath shanti se bank branch jaa kar unhe poori baat samjhaiye... bas itna hi aaj ke liye tay karte hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag poori tarah blast ho gaya hai
text: Theek hai, subah beti ko tiffin de kar branch jaungi. Par ye notice dekh kar jo dimaag poori tarah blast ho gaya hai mera tension se, lagta hai bank wale dande se baat karenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided systemic reframe on banking guidelines to reduce her immediate panic and structural fear of the bank.
text: Banking system mein aaj kal aisi unexpected medical emergencies ke liye grace period ya penalty maaf karne ka niyam hota hai, yeh ek aam aarthik prakriya hai jo musibat mein phase logon ko di jati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa sach mein hota hai? Mujhe ye kisi ne bataya hi nahi. Agar mujhe ek do mahine ki mohlat mil jaye toh main apni double shifts wapas chalu kar lungi taaki balance manage ho sake.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored her resilient duty-bound nature (Lens B) of wanting to protect her daughter's future by taking on double shifts.
text: Apni bacchi ke kal ke liye itni thakan ke bawajood wapas double shifts karke sab sambhalne ki yeh himmat sach mein apke jazbe ko dikhati hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Jazba toh rakhna hi padega, ro kar kisko fayda hona hai. Par us sahukaar ka kya hoga? Uska byaaj toh aur badh raha hoga na, wo toh kal parso mein aa tapkega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the feared consequence (Lens E) regarding the aggressive nature of the moneylender remaining unresolved.
text: Us sahukaar ke lagatar badhte byaaj aur uske ghar aa jane ka darr abhi bhi poori tarah se kahin na kahin dil mein baitha hua hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Darr hai par main ek baar mein sab nahi nipta sakti abhi. Kal pehle bank wala mamla thanda karungi, phir parso apne kisi bharosemand padosi ke sath milkar sahukaar se baat kar lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the shift in timeline and boundaries (Lens D), validating her pacing of problem-solving.
text: Ek ek karke in pareshaniyon ka samna karne ki yeh planning aur ek waqt par sirf kal ke din par dhyaan lagana bojh ko pehle se thoda kam kar deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha, ab thoda dimaag theek jagah par aa raha hai. Jab aapse baat shuru ki thi toh mujhe ekdum ghutan ho rahi thi rone se, par ab aage kya karna hai wo dikh raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the emotional shift from heavy panic to functional calm (Lens F), highlighting her emotional journey.
text: Us bhari ghabrahat wale toofan se nikal kar is shant aur suljhe hue man tak aana sach mein ek nayi ummeed deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan ji. Main abhi ja kar beti ki dawaiyan use de deti hoon, wo so jayegi toh aaram milega usko. Uski aawaz sun kar hi mujhe meri ladaai ki taqat milti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the deep relational bond (Lens C) that serves as her primary anchor and motivation.
text: Maa beti ke is khoobsurat rishte se hi aapko apne aane wale har din ki ladaai ladne ki sabse badi taqat aur sukoon mil raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Bas is waqt poori body ache kar rahi hai, shayad raat bhar tension lene aur ab rone dhone se jism jawab de raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offered a very small, practical physical coping step to ease her immediate somatic exhaustion.
text: Itne bhari din ke baad jism ka thakna laazmi hai, kya aaj beti ke so jane ke baad apna dhyan rakhne ke liye ek cup garam chai banakar das minute shanti se baithna behtar hoga?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut theek rahega. Yehi karungi main. Ek cup chai peekar sab dimaag se nikal dungi aaj. Meri baat sunne aur mera sath dene ke liye shukriya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closed out by reflecting the duty-based resilience (Lens B) of her single-mother role showing appreciation for her effort.
text: Apne is akelepan se nikalkar ek behtar kal ki taraf yeh pehla kadam uthana sach mein yeh dikhata hai ki ek maa apni bacchi aur ghar ke liye kya kuch nahi kar sakti...
